name: John Larson
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $152,378 for John Larson in U.S. House, CT-01. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
